overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character walking along a waterfront promenade with a distinctive orange arched canopy, then sitting on a bench to observe the futuristic urban environment. The scene is set during golden hour with warm sunlight filtering through the canopy structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with orange arched canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade under the orange canopy, approaching a seating area with benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera under the canopy structure

entered.detail: distinctive curved orange metal and glass canopy arching over the walkway
tall futuristic commercial buildings with reflective glass facades
tall palm trees lining the promenade walkway
tall digital billboard displaying animated advertisements with pink anime-style character

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete waterfront promenade during golden hour, entering a long corridor covered by a distinctive orange arched canopy. Modern glass buildings rise on the left while the waterfront is visible on the right. The character passes digital advertisement kiosks and palm trees as they approach a seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered seating area on waterfront promenade

events.description: character stops walking and sits down on a concrete bench
NPC in red shirt and shorts walks past the bench from right to left

agents.ego_description: sitting on a concrete bench under the canopy, occasionally looking at a handheld device and observing pedestrians walking by

notable_agents.action: bald man with beard sitting on the bench to the right, looking at his phone
woman in crop top and skirt walking past the bench from left to right

entered.detail: long concrete seating bench where the character and NPCs are sitting
small green food vendor stall visible in the distance under the canopy

segments.scene_description: The character sits on a concrete bench under the orange canopy, joining two other NPCs who are also seated. The camera remains stationary, panning slightly to follow pedestrians walking along the promenade, including a person in red shorts and a woman in a crop top. The green food kiosk remains visible in the distance as people walk past the seating area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sun-drenched waterfront promenade that transitions from a steady walk into a stationary observation of urban life. It begins with the character walking beneath a distinctive orange arched canopy, passing digital advertisement kiosks and palm trees while modern glass buildings rise to the left and the water glimmers to the right. As the character approaches a seating area, the forward motion slows and shifts as they sit on a concrete bench alongside two other NPCs. The camera then settles into a stationary position, panning slightly to track pedestrians in colorful attire walking past the seating area. Finally, the view expands to include a distant green food kiosk as the golden hour light filters through the canopy over the bustling promenade.
